reason: Tests check gold-specific implementation details (exact variable name 'uncroppedSize', exact expression 'image.naturalWidth / uncroppedSize.width', complete absence of 'vectorScale'). To pass behavior_in_task_description, instruction must include these literals, which violates no_solution_leakage. The tests are text-matching rather than behavior-verifying (tests_verify_behavior_not_text), making this conflict irreconcilable without modifying tests.
